summary: A short designed graphic, posted by the ICE field office, on a blue background. It presents a photograph of a man seated in a vehicle inside a white instant-photo frame, stamped diagonally with a distressed red 'ARRESTED' banner. Below the photo a hand-lettered name reads 'FABIAN HERRERA CORTES'. A 'CRIMINAL HISTORY' heading appears, and a line of text below it reads 'ASSAULT, ENDANGERING A CHILD, AND CRIMINAL POSSESSION OF A WEAPON'. A red rotating-beacon icon sits at lower left and an ICE officer badge at lower right. The audio is silent or a brief sound effect.

script.scene: Blue card: a man's photo inside a white photo frame stamped with a red 'ARRESTED' banner; hand-lettered name 'FABIAN HERRERA CORTES'; 'CRIMINAL HISTORY' heading; ICE badge and red beacon icons.
Same card with the criminal-history line revealed: 'ASSAULT, ENDANGERING A CHILD, AND CRIMINAL POSSESSION OF A WEAPON'.

notable_text: ARRESTED; FABIAN HERRERA CORTES; CRIMINAL HISTORY; ASSAULT, ENDANGERING A CHILD, AND CRIMINAL POSSESSION OF A WEAPON
